admin.title: Command stations
admin.subtitle: DCC command-station catalogue. Attach stations to layouts from the layout edit dialog.

delete.title: Delete command station "{{name}}"
delete.message: This cannot be undone. The station will be detached from every layout it was attached to.

fields.name: Name
fields.speedStepsHelp: DCC speed resolution forwarded to dcc-bus. Default 128.
fields.pollIntervalMsHelp: State-feed polling cadence for drivers without push. 0 uses the daemon default (750 ms).
fields.heartbeatSecsHelp: WebSocket ping interval. Default 2 s. If the ping does not arrive before the dead-man, the vehicle will be emergency-stopped.
fields.deadmanSecsHelp: Idle window after which the daemon applies emergency stop. Must be longer than the heartbeat. Default 6 s.
fields.z21ServerEnabledHelp: Independent of the outbound connection type. Stock Z21 apps connect to the dcc-bus host on UDP port 21105. Pairing uses CV3 and CV4 in the Z21 app.
fields.z21IpStickinessHelp: When enabled, handset sessions are keyed by client IP instead of UDP port. Reconnecting with a new port (common on home routers) keeps the pairing active.
fields.z21ServerDisableWarn: Disabling the server stops new pairings. Active handset sessions stop working after the dcc-bus daemon restarts.
fields.withrottleServerEnabledHelp: Engine Driver and WiThrottle apps connect to the dcc-bus host on TCP port 12090. Pairing uses a 6-digit code via the sentinel loco or Device Name (N).
fields.withrottleServerDisableWarn: Disabling the server stops new pairings. Active WiThrottle sessions stop working after the dcc-bus daemon restarts.
fields.maxLoconetSlotsHelp: How many slots BigFred may lease on this command station; the rest stay free for physical throttles. Default 80.
fields.idleTimeoutSecsHelp: After this idle period a remote handset (Z21/WiThrottle) loses its slot. 0 disables idle release. Default 60 s.
fields.bootStopEnabledHelp: When enabled, dcc-bus sends emergency stop to every roster locomotive once after daemon start. Off by default — avoids spurious slot leases on LocoNet after restart.

slotsDiag.title: DCC-Bus slot diagnostics
slotsDiag.subtitle: Live LocoNet slot leases, per-user caps, and FRED headroom. Read-only.
slotsDiag.unlimitedSlots: {{used}} active leases (no LocoNet budget on this station)
slotsDiag.releaseConfirm: Release the slot for address {{addr}}? The locomotive will be emergency-stopped.
